title: Piper tumidonodosum

The genus Piper is part of the order Piperales, which is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical regions. Piper tumidonodosum is native to the tropical regions of South America. As a member of the Piper genus, it is closely related to other species within the genus, such as Piper aduncum and Piper arboreum. The exact classification of Piper tumidonodosum may vary depending on the source and recent taxonomic revisions.
